summary: ANDROID 🤖 Falcon Charge Stand displays on User Guides screen but it shouldn't
scenario: User Guides screen incorrectly displays "Charge Stand" sub-device that should not be shown
description_clean: The User Guides screen in the app incorrectly displays a "Charge Stand" sub-device that should not appear. Expected behavior is that no sub-devices should be shown on the User Guides screen.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the menu icon or hamburger menu to access the side navigation.
Select 'User Guides' from the navigation menu.
Observe the list of devices and sub-devices displayed on the User Guides screen.
expected: The User Guides screen should display only the main device(s) and no sub-devices such as "Charge Stand".
actual: The User Guides screen incorrectly displays a "Charge Stand" sub-device that should not appear.
